value.title: Smucker's Uncrustables Peanut Butter & Chocolate Flavored Spread Frozen Sandwiches, Individually Wrapped, 24 Count
bullets: Exact assortment: 24 individually wrapped frozen sandwiches total: 24 Peanut Butter & Chocolate Flavored Spread.
Cold-pack components: An insulated foam cooler and frozen gel packs accompany the sandwiches; the stated 24 Count refers only to individual sandwiches.
Original wrappers: Every sandwich remains sealed in its original individual manufacturer wrapper, and the assortment contains only the varieties stated above.
Storage and handling: Keep the sandwiches frozen until ready to use and follow the thawing and handling directions printed on each original wrapper.
Label details: Review the original wrappers for the current ingredients, allergen statements, nutrition facts, and preparation directions before use.
value.description:
This listing contains 24 individual Smucker's Uncrustables frozen sandwiches: 24 Peanut Butter & Chocolate Flavored Spread. The stated quantity counts individual sandwiches and is not multiplied by a retail-carton count.

An insulated foam cooler and frozen gel packs accompany the sandwiches as cold-pack components. They are not included in the stated 24 sandwich count.

Every sandwich remains sealed in its original individual manufacturer wrapper. Keep the sandwiches frozen until ready to use and follow the thawing and handling directions printed on each wrapper.

Ingredients, allergen statements, nutrition facts, and preparation directions can vary by variety or manufacturer update. Review each original wrapper before use.

value.ingredients: Bread: Enriched Unbleached Flour (Wheat Flour, Malted Barley Flour, Niacin, Ferrous Sulfate, Thiamin Mononitrate, Riboflavin, Folic Acid), Water, Unbleached Whole Wheat Flour, Sugar, Yeast, Soybean Oil, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Salt, Dough Conditioner (Enzymes, Ascorbic Acid, Calcium Peroxide). Peanut Butter: Peanuts, Sugar, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Molasses, Fully Hydrogenated Vegetable Oils (Rapeseed And Soybean), Mono And Diglycerides, Salt. Chocolate Flavored Spread: Corn Syrup, Sugar, Water, Cocoa Processed With Alkali, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Pectin, Potassium Sorbate (Preservative), Calcium Chloride, Artificial Flavor.

value.description:
This listing contains 24 individual Smucker's Uncrustables frozen sandwiches: 12 Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread; 12 Morning Protein Peanut Butter & Mixed Berry Spread. The stated quantity counts individual sandwiches and is not multiplied by a retail-carton count.

An insulated foam cooler and frozen gel packs accompany the sandwiches as cold-pack components. They are not included in the stated 24 sandwich count.

Every sandwich remains sealed in its original individual manufacturer wrapper. Keep the sandwiches frozen until ready to use and follow the thawing and handling directions printed on each wrapper.

Ingredients, allergen statements, nutrition facts, and preparation directions can vary by variety or manufacturer update. Review each original wrapper before use.

value.ingredients: Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread: Bread: Enriched Unbleached Flour (Wheat Flour, Malted Barley Flour, Niacin, Ferrous Sulfate, Thiamin Mononitrate, Riboflavin, Folic Acid), Water, Unbleached Whole Wheat Flour, Sugar, Yeast, Soybean Oil, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Wheat Gluten, Salt, Guar Gum, Dough Conditioner (Enzymes, Ascorbic Acid, Calcium Peroxide). Peanut Butter: Peanuts, Sugar, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Fully Hydrogenated Vegetable Oils (Rapeseed And Soybean), Salt, Molasses. Raspberry Spread: Sugar, Raspberries, Water, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Pectin, Citric Acid, Natural Flavors, Potassium Sorbate (Preservative). | Morning Protein Peanut Butter & Mixed Berry Spread: Peanut Butter: Peanuts, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Fully Hydrogenated Vegetable Oils (Rapeseed And Soybean), Sugar, Salt, Molasses. Bread: Unbleached Whole Wheat Flour, Enriched Unbleached Flour (Wheat Flour, Malted Barley Flour, Niacin, Ferrous Sulfate, Thiamin Mononitrate, Riboflavin, Folic Acid), Water, Sugar, Yeast, Soybean Oil, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Wheat Gluten, Salt, Dough Conditioner (Mono And Diglycerides, Sodium Stearoyl Lactylate, DATEM, Enzymes, Ascorbic Acid, Calcium Peroxide). Mixed Berry Spread: Sugar, Strawberries, Blueberries, Water, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Pectin, Citric Acid, Potassium Sorbate (Preservative).

value.description:
This listing contains 24 individual Smucker's Uncrustables frozen sandwiches: 12 Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread; 12 Peanut Butter. The stated quantity counts individual sandwiches and is not multiplied by a retail-carton count.

An insulated foam cooler and frozen gel packs accompany the sandwiches as cold-pack components. They are not included in the stated 24 sandwich count.

Every sandwich remains sealed in its original individual manufacturer wrapper. Keep the sandwiches frozen until ready to use and follow the thawing and handling directions printed on each wrapper.

Ingredients, allergen statements, nutrition facts, and preparation directions can vary by variety or manufacturer update. Review each original wrapper before use.

value.title: Smucker's Uncrustables Frozen Sandwich Variety Pack, Peanut Butter & Honey Spread and Whole Wheat Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam, 24 Count
bullets: Exact assortment: 24 individually wrapped frozen sandwiches total: 12 Peanut Butter & Honey Spread; 12 Whole Wheat Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam.
Cold-pack components: An insulated foam cooler and frozen gel packs accompany the sandwiches; the stated 24 Count refers only to individual sandwiches.
Original wrappers: Every sandwich remains sealed in its original individual manufacturer wrapper, and the assortment contains only the varieties stated above.
Storage and handling: Keep the sandwiches frozen until ready to use and follow the thawing and handling directions printed on each original wrapper.
Label details: Review the original wrappers for the current ingredients, allergen statements, nutrition facts, and preparation directions before use.
value.description:
This listing contains 24 individual Smucker's Uncrustables frozen sandwiches: 12 Peanut Butter & Honey Spread; 12 Whole Wheat Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam. The stated quantity counts individual sandwiches and is not multiplied by a retail-carton count.

An insulated foam cooler and frozen gel packs accompany the sandwiches as cold-pack components. They are not included in the stated 24 sandwich count.

Every sandwich remains sealed in its original individual manufacturer wrapper. Keep the sandwiches frozen until ready to use and follow the thawing and handling directions printed on each wrapper.

Ingredients, allergen statements, nutrition facts, and preparation directions can vary by variety or manufacturer update. Review each original wrapper before use.

value.ingredients: Peanut Butter & Honey Spread: Bread: Unbleached Whole Wheat Flour, Enriched Unbleached Flour (Wheat Flour, Malted Barley Flour, Niacin, Ferrous Sulfate, Thiamin Mononitrate, Riboflavin, Folic Acid), Water, Sugar, Yeast, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Wheat Gluten, Soybean Oil, Salt, Dough Conditioner (Mono And Diglycerides, Sodium Stearoyl Lactylate, DATEM, Enzymes, Ascorbic Acid, Calcium Peroxide). Peanut Butter: Peanuts, Sugar, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Molasses, Fully Hydrogenated Vegetable Oils (Rapeseed And Soybean), Mono And Diglycerides, Salt. Honey Spread: Sugar, Water, Honey, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Pectin, Citric Acid, Potassium Sorbate (Preservative), Natural Flavor, Calcium Chloride. | Whole Wheat Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam: Bread: Unbleached Whole Wheat Flour, Enriched Unbleached Flour (Wheat Flour, Malted Barley Flour, Niacin, Ferrous Sulfate, Thiamin Mononitrate, Riboflavin, Folic Acid), Water, Sugar, Yeast, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Wheat Gluten, Soybean Oil, Salt, Dough Conditioner (Mono And Diglycerides, Sodium Stearoyl Lactylate, DATEM, Enzymes, Ascorbic Acid, Calcium Peroxide). value.title: Smucker's Uncrustables Peanut Butter & Grape Jelly Frozen Sandwiches, Individually Wrapped, 90 Count
bullets: Exact assortment: 90 individually wrapped frozen sandwiches total: 90 Peanut Butter & Grape Jelly.
Cold-pack components: An insulated foam cooler and frozen gel packs accompany the sandwiches; the stated 90 Count refers only to individual sandwiches.
Original wrappers: Every sandwich remains sealed in its original individual manufacturer wrapper, and the assortment contains only the varieties stated above.
Storage and handling: Keep the sandwiches frozen until ready to use and follow the thawing and handling directions printed on each original wrapper.
Label details: Review the original wrappers for the current ingredients, allergen statements, nutrition facts, and preparation directions before use.
value.description:
This listing contains 90 individual Smucker's Uncrustables frozen sandwiches: 90 Peanut Butter & Grape Jelly. The stated quantity counts individual sandwiches and is not multiplied by a retail-carton count.

An insulated foam cooler and frozen gel packs accompany the sandwiches as cold-pack components. They are not included in the stated 90 sandwich count.

Every sandwich remains sealed in its original individual manufacturer wrapper. Keep the sandwiches frozen until ready to use and follow the thawing and handling directions printed on each wrapper.

Ingredients, allergen statements, nutrition facts, and preparation directions can vary by variety or manufacturer update. Review each original wrapper before use.

value.ingredients: Bread: Enriched Unbleached Flour (Wheat Flour, Malted Barley Flour, Niacin, Ferrous Sulfate, Thiamin Mononitrate, Riboflavin, Folic Acid), Water, Unbleached Whole Wheat Flour, Sugar, Yeast, Soybean Oil, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Wheat Gluten, Salt, Guar Gum, Dough Conditioner (Enzymes, Ascorbic Acid, Calcium Peroxide). Peanut Butter: Peanuts, Sugar, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Fully Hydrogenated Vegetable Oils (Rapeseed And Soybean), Salt, Molasses. Grape Jelly: Sugar, Grape Juice, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Pectin, Citric Acid, Potassium Sorbate (Preservative).

value.description:
This listing contains 24 individual Smucker's Uncrustables frozen sandwiches: 12 Peanut Butter; 12 Whole Wheat Peanut Butter & Grape Jelly. The stated quantity counts individual sandwiches and is not multiplied by a retail-carton count.

value.description:
This listing contains 24 individual Smucker's Uncrustables frozen sandwiches: 24 Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam – 12g Protein. The stated quantity counts individual sandwiches and is not multiplied by a retail-carton count.

value.description:
This listing contains 24 individual Smucker's Uncrustables frozen sandwiches: 12 Peanut Butter; 12 Peanut Butter & Grape Jelly. The stated quantity counts individual sandwiches and is not multiplied by a retail-carton count.

An insulated foam cooler and frozen gel packs accompany the sandwiches as cold-pack components. They are not included in the stated 24 sandwich count.

Every sandwich remains sealed in its original individual manufacturer wrapper. Keep the sandwiches frozen until ready to use and follow the thawing and handling directions printed on each wrapper.

Ingredients, allergen statements, nutrition facts, and preparation directions can vary by variety or manufacturer update. Review each original wrapper before use.

bullets: Exact assortment: 24 individually wrapped frozen sandwiches total: 12 Peanut Butter & Honey Spread; 12 Peanut Butter & Grape Jelly.

value.description:
This listing contains 24 individual Smucker's Uncrustables frozen sandwiches: 12 Peanut Butter & Honey Spread; 12 Peanut Butter & Grape Jelly. The stated quantity counts individual sandwiches and is not multiplied by a retail-carton count.

An insulated foam cooler and frozen gel packs accompany the sandwiches as cold-pack components. They are not included in the stated 24 sandwich count.

Every sandwich remains sealed in its original individual manufacturer wrapper. Keep the sandwiches frozen until ready to use and follow the thawing and handling directions printed on each wrapper.

Ingredients, allergen statements, nutrition facts, and preparation directions can vary by variety or manufacturer update. Review each original wrapper before use.

value.ingredients: Peanut Butter & Honey Spread: Bread: Unbleached Whole Wheat Flour, Enriched Unbleached Flour (Wheat Flour, Malted Barley Flour, Niacin, Ferrous Sulfate, Thiamin Mononitrate, Riboflavin, Folic Acid), Water, Sugar, Yeast, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Wheat Gluten, Soybean Oil, Salt, Dough Conditioner (Mono And Diglycerides, Sodium Stearoyl Lactylate, DATEM, Enzymes, Ascorbic Acid, Calcium Peroxide). Peanut Butter: Peanuts, Sugar, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Fully Hydrogenated Vegetable Oils (Rapeseed And Soybean), Salt, Molasses. Grape Jelly: Sugar, Grape Juice, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Pectin, Citric Acid, Potassium Sorbate (Preservative).

value.description:
This listing contains 24 individual Smucker's Uncrustables frozen sandwiches: 24 Whole Wheat Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam. The stated quantity counts individual sandwiches and is not multiplied by a retail-carton count.

An insulated foam cooler and frozen gel packs accompany the sandwiches as cold-pack components. They are not included in the stated 24 sandwich count.

Every sandwich remains sealed in its original individual manufacturer wrapper. Keep the sandwiches frozen until ready to use and follow the thawing and handling directions printed on each wrapper.

Ingredients, allergen statements, nutrition facts, and preparation directions can vary by variety or manufacturer update. Review each original wrapper before use.

This listing contains 24 individual Smucker's Uncrustables frozen sandwiches: 12 Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread; 12 Whole Wheat Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam. The stated quantity counts individual sandwiches and is not multiplied by a retail-carton count.

value.description:
This listing contains 24 individual Smucker's Uncrustables frozen sandwiches: 12 Whole Wheat Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam; 12 Peanut Butter & Apple Cinnamon Jelly – 12g Protein. The stated quantity counts individual sandwiches and is not multiplied by a retail-carton count.

An insulated foam cooler and frozen gel packs accompany the sandwiches as cold-pack components. They are not included in the stated 24 sandwich count.

Every sandwich remains sealed in its original individual manufacturer wrapper. Keep the sandwiches frozen until ready to use and follow the thawing and handling directions printed on each wrapper.

Ingredients, allergen statements, nutrition facts, and preparation directions can vary by variety or manufacturer update. Review each original wrapper before use.

value.ingredients: Whole Wheat Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam: Bread: Unbleached Whole Wheat Flour, Enriched Unbleached Flour (Wheat Flour, Malted Barley Flour, Niacin, Ferrous Sulfate, Thiamin Mononitrate, Riboflavin, Folic Acid), Water, Sugar, Yeast, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Wheat Gluten, Soybean Oil, Salt, Dough Conditioner (Mono And Diglycerides, Sodium Stearoyl Lactylate, DATEM, Enzymes, Ascorbic Acid, Calcium Peroxide). Peanut Butter: Peanuts, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Fully Hydrogenated Vegetable Oils (Rapeseed And Soybean), Mono And Diglycerides, Molasses, Sugar, Salt. Strawberry Spread: Sugar, Strawberries, Water, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Fruit Pectin, Citric Acid, Locust Bean Gum, Potassium Sorbate (Preservative), Calcium Chloride. | Peanut Butter & Apple Cinnamon Jelly – 12g Protein: Peanut Butter: Peanuts, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Fully Hydrogenated Vegetable Oils (Rapeseed And Soybean), Mono And Diglycerides, Molasses, Sugar, Salt. Bread: Unbleached Whole Wheat Flour, Enriched Unbleached Flour (Wheat Flour, Malted Barley Flour, Niacin, Ferrous Sulfate, Thiamin Mononitrate, Riboflavin, Folic Acid), Water, Sugar, Yeast, Soybean Oil, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Wheat Gluten, Salt, Dough Conditioner (Mono And Diglycerides, Sodium Stearoyl Lactylate, DATEM, Enzymes, Ascorbic Acid, Calcium Peroxide). Apple Cinnamon Jelly: Sugar, Apple Juice, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Pectin, Citric Acid, Cinnamon, Potassium Sorbate (Preservative).

bullets: Exact assortment: 45 individually wrapped frozen sandwiches total: 45 Whole Wheat Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam.

value.description:
This listing contains 45 individual Smucker's Uncrustables frozen sandwiches: 45 Whole Wheat Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam. The stated quantity counts individual sandwiches and is not multiplied by a retail-carton count.

An insulated foam cooler and frozen gel packs accompany the sandwiches as cold-pack components. They are not included in the stated 45 sandwich count.

Every sandwich remains sealed in its original individual manufacturer wrapper. Keep the sandwiches frozen until ready to use and follow the thawing and handling directions printed on each wrapper.

Ingredients, allergen statements, nutrition facts, and preparation directions can vary by variety or manufacturer update. Review each original wrapper before use.

value.ingredients: Bread: Unbleached Whole Wheat Flour, Enriched Unbleached Flour (Wheat Flour, Malted Barley Flour, Niacin, Ferrous Sulfate, Thiamin Mononitrate, Riboflavin, Folic Acid), Water, Sugar, Yeast, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Wheat Gluten, Soybean Oil, Salt, Dough Conditioner (Mono And Diglycerides, Sodium Stearoyl Lactylate, DATEM, Enzymes, Ascorbic Acid, Calcium Peroxide). Peanut Butter: Peanuts, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Fully Hydrogenated Vegetable Oils (Rapeseed And Soybean), Mono And Diglycerides, Molasses, Sugar, Salt. Strawberry Spread: Sugar, Strawberries, Water, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Fruit Pectin, Citric Acid, Locust Bean Gum, Potassium Sorbate (Preservative), Calcium Chloride.

value.description:
This listing contains 24 individual Smucker's Uncrustables frozen sandwiches: 12 Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread; 12 Peanut Butter & Honey Spread. The stated quantity counts individual sandwiches and is not multiplied by a retail-carton count.

An insulated foam cooler and frozen gel packs accompany the sandwiches as cold-pack components. They are not included in the stated 24 sandwich count.

Every sandwich remains sealed in its original individual manufacturer wrapper. Keep the sandwiches frozen until ready to use and follow the thawing and handling directions printed on each wrapper.

Ingredients, allergen statements, nutrition facts, and preparation directions can vary by variety or manufacturer update. Review each original wrapper before use.

value.ingredients: Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread: Bread: Enriched Unbleached Flour (Wheat Flour, Malted Barley Flour, Niacin, Ferrous Sulfate, Thiamin Mononitrate, Riboflavin, Folic Acid), Water, Unbleached Whole Wheat Flour, Sugar, Yeast, Soybean Oil, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Wheat Gluten, Salt, Guar Gum, Dough Conditioner (Enzymes, Ascorbic Acid, Calcium Peroxide). Peanut Butter: Peanuts, Sugar, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Fully Hydrogenated Vegetable Oils (Rapeseed And Soybean), Salt, Molasses. Raspberry Spread: Sugar, Raspberries, Water, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Pectin, Citric Acid, Natural Flavors, Potassium Sorbate (Preservative). | Peanut Butter & Honey Spread: Bread: Unbleached Whole Wheat Flour, Enriched Unbleached Flour (Wheat Flour, Malted Barley Flour, Niacin, Ferrous Sulfate, Thiamin Mononitrate, Riboflavin, Folic Acid), Water, Sugar, Yeast, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Wheat Gluten, Soybean Oil, Salt, Dough Conditioner (Mono And Diglycerides, Sodium Stearoyl Lactylate, DATEM, Enzymes, Ascorbic Acid, Calcium Peroxide). Peanut Butter: Peanuts, Sugar, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Molasses, Fully Hydrogenated Vegetable Oils (Rapeseed And Soybean), Mono And Diglycerides, Salt. Honey Spread: Sugar, Water, Honey, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Pectin, Citric Acid, Potassium Sorbate (Preservative), Natural Flavor, Calcium Chloride.

value.title: Smucker's Uncrustables Frozen Sandwich Variety Pack, Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread and Peanut Butter & Chocolate Flavored Spread, 24 Count
bullets: Exact assortment: 24 individually wrapped frozen sandwiches total: 12 Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread; 12 Peanut Butter & Chocolate Flavored Spread.
Cold-pack components: An insulated foam cooler and frozen gel packs accompany the sandwiches; the stated 24 Count refers only to individual sandwiches.
Original wrappers: Every sandwich remains sealed in its original individual manufacturer wrapper, and the assortment contains only the varieties stated above.
Storage and handling: Keep the sandwiches frozen until ready to use and follow the thawing and handling directions printed on each original wrapper.
Label details: Review the original wrappers for the current ingredients, allergen statements, nutrition facts, and preparation directions before use.
value.description:
This listing contains 24 individual Smucker's Uncrustables frozen sandwiches: 12 Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread; 12 Peanut Butter & Chocolate Flavored Spread. The stated quantity counts individual sandwiches and is not multiplied by a retail-carton count.

An insulated foam cooler and frozen gel packs accompany the sandwiches as cold-pack components. They are not included in the stated 24 sandwich count.

Every sandwich remains sealed in its original individual manufacturer wrapper. Keep the sandwiches frozen until ready to use and follow the thawing and handling directions printed on each wrapper.

Ingredients, allergen statements, nutrition facts, and preparation directions can vary by variety or manufacturer update. Review each original wrapper before use.

value.ingredients: Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread: Bread: Enriched Unbleached Flour (Wheat Flour, Malted Barley Flour, Niacin, Ferrous Sulfate, Thiamin Mononitrate, Riboflavin, Folic Acid), Water, Unbleached Whole Wheat Flour, Sugar, Yeast, Soybean Oil, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Wheat Gluten, Salt, Guar Gum, Dough Conditioner (Enzymes, Ascorbic Acid, Calcium Peroxide). Peanut Butter: Peanuts, Sugar, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Fully Hydrogenated Vegetable Oils (Rapeseed And Soybean), Salt, Molasses. Raspberry Spread: Sugar, Raspberries, Water, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Pectin, Citric Acid, Natural Flavors, Potassium Sorbate (Preservative). | Peanut Butter & Chocolate Flavored Spread: Bread: Enriched Unbleached Flour (Wheat Flour, Malted Barley Flour, Niacin, Ferrous Sulfate, Thiamin Mononitrate, Riboflavin, Folic Acid), Water, Unbleached Whole Wheat Flour, Sugar, Yeast, Soybean Oil, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Salt, Dough Conditioner (Enzymes, Ascorbic Acid, Calcium Peroxide). Peanut Butter: Peanuts, Sugar, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Molasses, Fully Hydrogenated Vegetable Oils (Rapeseed And Soybean), Mono And Diglycerides, Salt. Chocolate Flavored Spread: Corn Syrup, Sugar, Water, Cocoa Processed With Alkali, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Pectin, Potassium Sorbate (Preservative), Calcium Chloride, Artificial Flavor.

value.description:
This listing contains 24 individual Smucker's Uncrustables frozen sandwiches: 12 Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread; 12 Morning Protein Peanut Butter & Mixed Berry Spread. The stated quantity counts individual sandwiches and is not multiplied by a retail-carton count.

An insulated foam cooler and frozen gel packs accompany the sandwiches as cold-pack components. They are not included in the stated 24 sandwich count.

Every sandwich remains sealed in its original individual manufacturer wrapper. Keep the sandwiches frozen until ready to use and follow the thawing and handling directions printed on each wrapper.

Ingredients, allergen statements, nutrition facts, and preparation directions can vary by variety or manufacturer update. Review each original wrapper before use.

value.ingredients: Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread: Bread: Enriched Unbleached Flour (Wheat Flour, Malted Barley Flour, Niacin, Ferrous Sulfate, Thiamin Mononitrate, Riboflavin, Folic Acid), Water, Unbleached Whole Wheat Flour, Sugar, Yeast, Soybean Oil, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Wheat Gluten, Salt, Guar Gum, Dough Conditioner (Enzymes, Ascorbic Acid, Calcium Peroxide). Peanut Butter: Peanuts, Sugar, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Fully Hydrogenated Vegetable Oils (Rapeseed And Soybean), Salt, Molasses. Raspberry Spread: Sugar, Raspberries, Water, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Pectin, Citric Acid, Natural Flavors, Potassium Sorbate (Preservative). | Morning Protein Peanut Butter & Mixed Berry Spread: Peanut Butter: Peanuts, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Fully Hydrogenated Vegetable Oils (Rapeseed And Soybean), Sugar, Salt, Molasses. Bread: Unbleached Whole Wheat Flour, Enriched Unbleached Flour (Wheat Flour, Malted Barley Flour, Niacin, Ferrous Sulfate, Thiamin Mononitrate, Riboflavin, Folic Acid), Water, Sugar, Yeast, Soybean Oil, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Wheat Gluten, Salt, Dough Conditioner (Mono And Diglycerides, Sodium Stearoyl Lactylate, DATEM, Enzymes, Ascorbic Acid, Calcium Peroxide). Mixed Berry Spread: Sugar, Strawberries, Blueberries, Water, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Pectin, Citric Acid, Potassium Sorbate (Preservative).

value.title: Smucker's Uncrustables Peanut Butter & Honey Spread Frozen Sandwiches, Individually Wrapped, 120 Count
bullets: Exact assortment: 120 individually wrapped frozen sandwiches total: 120 Peanut Butter & Honey Spread.
Cold-pack components: An insulated foam cooler and frozen gel packs accompany the sandwiches; the stated 120 Count refers only to individual sandwiches.
Original wrappers: Every sandwich remains sealed in its original individual manufacturer wrapper, and the assortment contains only the varieties stated above.
Storage and handling: Keep the sandwiches frozen until ready to use and follow the thawing and handling directions printed on each original wrapper.
Label details: Review the original wrappers for the current ingredients, allergen statements, nutrition facts, and preparation directions before use.
value.description:
This listing contains 120 individual Smucker's Uncrustables frozen sandwiches: 120 Peanut Butter & Honey Spread. The stated quantity counts individual sandwiches and is not multiplied by a retail-carton count.

An insulated foam cooler and frozen gel packs accompany the sandwiches as cold-pack components. They are not included in the stated 120 sandwich count.

Every sandwich remains sealed in its original individual manufacturer wrapper. Keep the sandwiches frozen until ready to use and follow the thawing and handling directions printed on each wrapper.

Ingredients, allergen statements, nutrition facts, and preparation directions can vary by variety or manufacturer update. Review each original wrapper before use.

value.ingredients: Bread: Unbleached Whole Wheat Flour, Enriched Unbleached Flour (Wheat Flour, Malted Barley Flour, Niacin, Ferrous Sulfate, Thiamin Mononitrate, Riboflavin, Folic Acid), Water, Sugar, Yeast, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Wheat Gluten, Soybean Oil, Salt, Dough Conditioner (Mono And Diglycerides, Sodium Stearoyl Lactylate, DATEM, Enzymes, Ascorbic Acid, Calcium Peroxide). Peanut Butter: Peanuts, Sugar, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Molasses, Fully Hydrogenated Vegetable Oils (Rapeseed And Soybean), Mono And Diglycerides, Salt. Honey Spread: Sugar, Water, Honey, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Pectin, Citric Acid, Potassium Sorbate (Preservative), Natural Flavor, Calcium Chloride.

bullets: Exact assortment: 45 individually wrapped frozen sandwiches total: 45 Peanut Butter.

value.description:
This listing contains 45 individual Smucker's Uncrustables frozen sandwiches: 45 Peanut Butter. The stated quantity counts individual sandwiches and is not multiplied by a retail-carton count.

An insulated foam cooler and frozen gel packs accompany the sandwiches as cold-pack components. They are not included in the stated 45 sandwich count.

Every sandwich remains sealed in its original individual manufacturer wrapper. Keep the sandwiches frozen until ready to use and follow the thawing and handling directions printed on each wrapper.

Ingredients, allergen statements, nutrition facts, and preparation directions can vary by variety or manufacturer update. Review each original wrapper before use.

value.title: Smucker's Uncrustables Frozen Sandwich Variety Pack, Whole Wheat Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam and Morning Protein Peanut Butter & Mixed Berry Spread, 24 Count
bullets: Exact assortment: 24 individually wrapped frozen sandwiches total: 12 Whole Wheat Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam; 12 Morning Protein Peanut Butter & Mixed Berry Spread.
Cold-pack components: An insulated foam cooler and frozen gel packs accompany the sandwiches; the stated 24 Count refers only to individual sandwiches.
Original wrappers: Every sandwich remains sealed in its original individual manufacturer wrapper, and the assortment contains only the varieties stated above.
Storage and handling: Keep the sandwiches frozen until ready to use and follow the thawing and handling directions printed on each original wrapper.
Label details: Review the original wrappers for the current ingredients, allergen statements, nutrition facts, and preparation directions before use.
value.description:
This listing contains 24 individual Smucker's Uncrustables frozen sandwiches: 12 Whole Wheat Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam; 12 Morning Protein Peanut Butter & Mixed Berry Spread. The stated quantity counts individual sandwiches and is not multiplied by a retail-carton count.

An insulated foam cooler and frozen gel packs accompany the sandwiches as cold-pack components. They are not included in the stated 24 sandwich count.

Every sandwich remains sealed in its original individual manufacturer wrapper. Keep the sandwiches frozen until ready to use and follow the thawing and handling directions printed on each wrapper.

Ingredients, allergen statements, nutrition facts, and preparation directions can vary by variety or manufacturer update. Review each original wrapper before use.

value.ingredients: Whole Wheat Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam: Bread: Unbleached Whole Wheat Flour, Enriched Unbleached Flour (Wheat Flour, Malted Barley Flour, Niacin, Ferrous Sulfate, Thiamin Mononitrate, Riboflavin, Folic Acid), Water, Sugar, Yeast, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Wheat Gluten, Soybean Oil, Salt, Dough Conditioner (Mono And Diglycerides, Sodium Stearoyl Lactylate, DATEM, Enzymes, Ascorbic Acid, Calcium Peroxide). Peanut Butter: Peanuts, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Fully Hydrogenated Vegetable Oils (Rapeseed And Soybean), Mono And Diglycerides, Molasses, Sugar, Salt. Strawberry Spread: Sugar, Strawberries, Water, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Fruit Pectin, Citric Acid, Locust Bean Gum, Potassium Sorbate (Preservative), Calcium Chloride. | Morning Protein Peanut Butter & Mixed Berry Spread: Peanut Butter: Peanuts, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Fully Hydrogenated Vegetable Oils (Rapeseed And Soybean), Sugar, Salt, Molasses. Bread: Unbleached Whole Wheat Flour, Enriched Unbleached Flour (Wheat Flour, Malted Barley Flour, Niacin, Ferrous Sulfate, Thiamin Mononitrate, Riboflavin, Folic Acid), Water, Sugar, Yeast, Soybean Oil, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Wheat Gluten, Salt, Dough Conditioner (Mono And Diglycerides, Sodium Stearoyl Lactylate, DATEM, Enzymes, Ascorbic Acid, Calcium Peroxide). Mixed Berry Spread: Sugar, Strawberries, Blueberries, Water, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Pectin, Citric Acid, Potassium Sorbate (Preservative).
